templates.title: filex
templates.name: filex
templates.description: Fast, self-hosted file manager: browse, upload, preview, share and edit files across local folders, S3/MinIO, SFTP, WebDAV and FTP. Share links with PIN and expiry, file-drop upload links, full-text search, thumbnails, trash and versioning, RBAC, TOTP 2FA, optional SSO (OIDC/LDAP) and an AI/MCP API for agents.

env.name: FILEX_PUBLIC_URL
env.label: Public URL
env.description: The URL users open in the browser — share links and SSO redirects are built from it.

env.name: FILEX_ADMIN_EMAIL
env.label: Admin email (optional)
env.description: Preset the first admin account. Leave empty for admin@local.

env.name: FILEX_ADMIN_PASSWORD
env.label: Admin password (optional)
env.description: Leave empty for a random password printed once in the container logs (also saved to /data/.first-run.txt).

env.name: FILEX_DEFAULT_STORAGE_DRIVER
env.label: Default storage driver
env.description: Storage seeded on first boot. Keep 'local' to use the /srv/files volume; empty seeds nothing.

env.name: FILEX_DEFAULT_STORAGE_PATH
env.label: Default storage path
env.description: Container path of the seeded local storage.

templates.note: Sign in at /admin. First run creates an admin account and prints the password once in the container logs unless FILEX_ADMIN_EMAIL/FILEX_ADMIN_PASSWORD are set. The /data volume holds the SQLite DB, search index and thumbnails; /srv/files is the managed files folder — edit the volume mappings to bind them to host paths.
